assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 17: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row added with serena_ui as Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered

assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 29-42 preserve the original naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.'), the serena_backend find_symbol example (lines 33-37), and the serena_backend limitation (line 42: '`serena_backend`: rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). Only line 43 is new: '`serena_ui`: No known limitations'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date

Security Configuration was not scaffolded.' changes-log.md confirms under 'Not Scaffolded': 'Security Configuration | User declined to enable security triage'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section (file ends at line 50 after Bug Configuration).
